description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds volk-gnssdr on Android NDK for multiple architectures. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events for specific paths and allow manual dispatch. It should use an ubuntu-latest environment, install dependencies, set up the Android SDK and NDK, and then build volk-gnssdr for armeabi-v7a, arm64-v8a, x86, and x86_64 architectures.
